purpose: Provide a single reader-facing verification path for the current Transition Periodic Table development release.

verification_steps.name: Confirm release index
verification_steps.proves: The public release directory identifies the current release and lists public pages and JSON surfaces.

verification_steps.name: Confirm milestone ordering
verification_steps.proves: The newest unlocked milestone is MS-010 and MS-011 remains pending.

verification_steps.name: Confirm automation release state
verification_steps.proves: The automation release state is receipt_backed_automation_ready.

verification_steps.name: Confirm verifier verdict
verification_steps.proves: The automation-release verifier returned ALLOW and release-mode checks are satisfied.

verification_steps.name: Confirm receipt-backed evidence
verification_steps.proves: T13 and T14 provide receipt-bound and reconstruction-backed evidence surfaces.

verification_steps.name: Confirm transition evidence
verification_steps.proves: Transition evidence levels and runtime states are publicly inspectable.

verification_steps.name: Confirm experiment ledger
verification_steps.proves: Recent experiment rows and verdicts are visible as the test trail behind the table state.

not_claimed: This guide does not claim final publication readiness.
This guide does not claim all transitions are 5/5 Receipt-backed.
This guide does not claim unbounded autonomy.
This guide describes how to verify the currently published development state.
next_unlock_condition: MS-011 can be marked released after transition-verification-guide.html is live and linked from the primary public research surfaces.
